<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <title>Snake</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
</head>
<body>
  <canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
  <script src="render.js"></script><!-- defines canvas, ctx, draw() -->
  <script src="input.js"></script><!-- attaches keyboard + touch listeners -->
  <script src="game.js"></script> <!-- state, loop, boot -->

</body>
</html>
